section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in dry bulk this week, Suzhou Xinxin Shipping announced orders for two 86k dwt Panamax bulkers at Taizhou Kouan SB. Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
